skill.name: cc-skill-security-review
skill.description: Use this skill when adding authentication, handling user input, working with secrets, creating API endpoints, or implementing payment/sensitive features. Provides comprehensive security checklist and best practices for secure development.
skill.summary: Security review skill that provides comprehensive security checklists and best practices for secure application development.
skill.author: affaan-m

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 91 potential security issues in SKILL.md documentation file. All findings are FALSE POSITIVES - the detected patterns are code examples within educational documentation showing both vulnerable and secure coding patterns. The skill teaches security best practices through comparison examples (marked with ❌ NEVER and ✅ ALWAYS). No executable code, no actual security risks. This is a legitimate educational security review skill.

content.user_title: Secure Your Code with Comprehensive Security Reviews
content.value_statement: Prevent common vulnerabilities like SQL injection, XSS, and authentication flaws with automated security checklists. Get expert guidance on secure coding practices during development.
actual_capabilities: Provides comprehensive security checklists for authentication, input validation, SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, CSRF protection, and rate limiting
Teaches secure coding patterns with side-by-side comparisons of vulnerable vs secure code examples
Covers blockchain security for Solana including wallet verification and transaction validation
Includes pre-deployment security checklist covering 17 critical security areas
Provides security testing examples for automated test coverage
Documents best practices for secrets management, error handling, and dependency security
limitations: Documentation-only skill that provides guidance but does not automatically scan or fix code
Requires developer knowledge to correctly implement the security patterns shown
Does not integrate with automated security testing tools or CI/CD pipelines
Examples focus on TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystem with some framework-specific guidance

use_cases.title: Pre-commit Security Review
use_cases.description: Developer runs this skill before committing code to verify authentication, input validation, and SQL injection prevention patterns are correctly implemented

use_cases.title: Pre-deployment Security Audit
use_cases.description: Team lead uses the pre-deployment checklist to ensure all 17 security requirements are met before production release

use_cases.title: Security Learning Tool
use_cases.description: Junior developer studies the skill examples to learn secure coding patterns and understand common vulnerability types

prompt_templates.title: Basic Security Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Run security review on my current code changes. Check for hardcoded secrets, input validation issues, SQL injection vulnerabilities, and authentication problems.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick security check before committing code

prompt_templates.title: Authentication Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my authentication implementation. Verify that tokens use httpOnly cookies (not localStorage), authorization checks are in place, and session management is secure.

prompt_templates.title: API Endpoint Security
prompt_templates.prompt: Conduct security review on my new API endpoints. Check SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, CSRF tokens, rate limiting, and error message security.

prompt_templates.title: Pre-deployment Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Run complete pre-deployment security audit. Verify all 17 checklist items including secrets management, input validation, parameterized queries, XSS/CSRF protection, rate limiting, HTTPS enforcement, security headers, and dependency security.
prompt_templates.scenario: Final security review before production deployment

output_examples.input: Run security review on this authentication code
output: ✓ PASS: Tokens stored in httpOnly cookies
✓ PASS: Authorization check before user deletion
⚠ WARNING: Consider adding session refresh mechanism
No critical vulnerabilities found. Ready for deployment.

output_examples.input: Check my database queries for SQL injection
output: ❌ CRITICAL: Line 42 - String concatenation in query
✓ PASS: All other queries use parameterized statements
Action required: Fix line 42 before deploying.

best_practices: Run security review skill before every commit involving authentication, input handling, database queries, or API endpoints
Use the pre-deployment checklist as a final verification step before production releases
Study both the NEVER and ALWAYS examples to understand vulnerability patterns and their fixes
anti_patterns: Using this skill as a replacement for automated security testing tools or penetration testing
Running security review only after production issues occur instead of during development
Treating documentation examples as copy-paste solutions without understanding the security principles

faq.question: Does this skill automatically scan my code for vulnerabilities?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides security checklists, best practices, and educational examples. You must apply the guidance manually to your code. It does not perform automated scanning.

faq.question: Can this skill prevent all security vulnerabilities?
faq.answer: No. This skill covers common vulnerabilities like OWASP Top 10 but cannot prevent all possible security issues. Combine with automated tools, penetration testing, and security reviews for comprehensive protection.

faq.question: Is this skill only for TypeScript and JavaScript projects?
faq.answer: The examples use TypeScript/JavaScript, but security principles apply to all languages. Concepts like input validation, parameterized queries, and authentication are universal. Adapt patterns to your language.

faq.question: Should I use this skill instead of security audit tools?
faq.answer: No. Use this skill during development alongside automated tools like npm audit, SAST tools, and dependency scanners. This skill helps you write secure code; tools verify it.

faq.question: How often should I run security review?
faq.answer: Run before every commit for security-sensitive changes (authentication, input handling, APIs). Run the pre-deployment checklist before every production release. Make security part of your development workflow.

faq.question: Does this skill cover blockchain and Web3 security?
faq.answer: Yes, it includes a section on Solana blockchain security covering wallet verification, transaction validation, and balance checks. Apply similar principles to other blockchain platforms.
